name: Frostborn Ward Armet
setBonus: 1 of Set: When digging for Ostorian Relics there is a 25% chance you will obtain an additional relic. 2 of Set: Wanderer's Vigor — When not in a party, you regenerate 3% of your Maximum Hit Points, up to 1000, every 3 seconds. 3 of Set: When in Icewind Dale: You and your allies gain 5 Movement Speed. This affect does not stack.

name: Horn of Valhalla

equipBonuses.name: Artifact Equipment
equipBonuses.description: Summons a single ghostly Barbarian that will protect you for 6 seconds. The Barbarian will threaten nearby enemies, placing himself at the top of their threat list and strike random targets in front of him for 8,718 damage every few seconds. Recharge time: 160s.

setBonus: 3 of Set: Whenever an enemy attacks the bearer, that enemy's damage is reduced by 1% for 6 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times.

name: Belt of Valhalla

equipBonuses.name: Artifact Equipment
equipBonuses.description: Though it appears to be typical barbarian apparel, this belt empowers its wearer with stalwart toughness.

setBonus: 3 of Set: Whenever an enemy attacks the bearer, that enemy's damage is reduced by 1% for 6 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times.

name: Cloak of Valhalla

equipBonuses.name: Artifact Equipment
equipBonuses.description: This intricately woven cloak's unique pattern is an inspiration to those who follow its wearer into battle.

setBonus: 3 of Set: Whenever an enemy attacks the bearer, that enemy's damage is reduced by 1% for 6 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times.

name: Twisted Ropalo — IL 300
setBonus: 2 of Set: Gain the affect of paranoia and bloodlust. Paranoia: Gain 10 Defense when struck, lose a stack when you strike an enemy. Bloodlust: Gain 10 Power when you strike an enemy, lose a stack when you are struck. Neither paranoia nor bloodlust may exceed 24 stacks or be reduced below 1 stack.
notes: Bind on Pickup (Account); Artifact Equipment; Recommended
